Description:
Ballistics of the 3VBM7, 3VBM8 APFSDS rounds fired from the 125mm tank gun D-81.

Shot	Proj	Mass	Inc.	Main Charge		Velocity
		kg
3VBM7	3BM15	5.91	3BM16	4Zh40, 52		1785 m/s
3VBM8	3BM17	5.90	3BM18	the same		the same

Inc. Charge:   3.4 kg 15/1 V/A
Charge 4Zh52:  5.0 kg 12/7 V/A
Charge 4Zh40:  3.0 kg 15/1 V/A + 2 kg 12/7 V/A
4Zh40 (introudced in 1962) is interchangeable with 4Zh52 (introudced in 1976)

3VBM7 (5.9kg):	

Temp.	M.V.	Pmcp
	m/s	MPa
-40°C	1735	380
 15°C	1785	452
 40°C	1965	510
